message:
test(ifc): update declassification tests for scoped per-contract authorizer API and add cross-contract rejection test

Updates all ifc_declassification_runtime tests to use the new
trust_receipt_authorizer_for_contract("decision-contract-ifc", key) API
instead of the removed trust_receipt_authorizer(key) global form, following
the refactor in 574ca0a.

New test: runtime_lattice_rejects_authorizer_trusted_for_other_contract
verifies that a signing key trusted for "decision-contract-other" cannot
authorize receipts for obligations bound to "decision-contract-ifc". This
ensures the per-contract scoping actually prevents cross-contract key reuse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
